description: Monitor ASP.NET Core application performance with modern .NET 9+ OTLP metrics. Covers HTTP server requests, Kestrel server internals, .NET runtime process metrics (GC, thread pool, exceptions), and resource usage (CPU, memory).
title: ASP.NET Core Metrics

b0ef5386-5803-4810-86c6-be43f2ce9ec9.name: service_name
b0ef5386-5803-4810-86c6-be43f2ce9ec9.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration'
GROUP BY `service.name`

4b3dfcc1-1af0-4fb7-9739-997418786cf6.name: deployment_environment
4b3dfcc1-1af0-4fb7-9739-997418786cf6.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'http.server.request.duration'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

widgets.description: Total CPU time consumed by the process, shown as a rate per second. Queries both dotnet.process.cpu.time (.NET 9+) and process.cpu.time (.NET 8) for compatibility.
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Current process memory working set. Queries both dotnet.process.memory.working_set (.NET 9+) and process.memory.usage (.NET 8) for compatibility.
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Rate of incoming HTTP requests per second, grouped by service name.
widgets.title: Request Rate

widgets.description: Percentage of HTTP requests resulting in 4xx or 5xx status codes. Computed as (error count / total count) * 100.
widgets.title: Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: Number of HTTP requests currently being handled by the server.
widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.description: HTTP request rate broken down by response status code to identify error patterns.
widgets.title: HTTP Request Rate by Status Code

widgets.description: 95th percentile request duration broken down by HTTP route.
widgets.title: Request Duration by Route (P95)

widgets.description: Number of garbage collections per generation, using the modern dotnet.gc.collections metric (.NET 9+).
widgets.title: GC Collections Count

widgets.description: Size of the .NET garbage collector managed heap per generation after the last collection.
widgets.title: GC Heap Size

widgets.description: Number of thread pool threads currently active, using the modern dotnet.thread_pool.thread.count metric (.NET 9+).
widgets.title: Thread Pool Threads

widgets.description: Number of work items queued to the .NET thread pool, using the modern dotnet.thread_pool.queue.length metric (.NET 9+).
widgets.title: Thread Pool Queue Length

widgets.description: Count of exceptions thrown by the .NET runtime, using the modern dotnet.exceptions metric (.NET 9+).
widgets.title: Exception Count

widgets.description: Number of active connections currently open on Kestrel.
widgets.title: Kestrel Active Connections

widgets.description: Number of connections waiting in the Kestrel connection queue.
widgets.title: Kestrel Queue Length

widgets.description: 95th percentile connection duration on the Kestrel server.
widgets.title: Kestrel Connection Duration (P95)

widgets.description: Rate of connections rejected by the Kestrel server due to connection limits being reached.
widgets.title: Kestrel Rejected Connections
